string.text:
%c[ui_gray_1]Infiltrator Tactical Kit for Steyr AUG in 9mm cal. The kit includes Long Heavy Barrel (508mm), Low-profile VLTOR receiver with Corvus Defensio tactical rail, Voodoo-s thermal sight with ACOG (TA47C Reticle) and MAWL-C1+ Laser sight. 
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]Features: 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Significantly increased accuracy.
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Significantly increased bullet flight speed and effective weapon range.
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Increased weapon damage.

%c[ui_gray_1]Infiltrator Tactical Kit for Steyr AUG in 9mm cal. The kit includes extended barrel (417mm), Custom Spectre Tactical black stock, Etherium Holo sight with 3X Magnifier and MAWL-C1+ Laser sight. 
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]Features: 
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Slightly increased accuracy.
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Slightly increased bullet flight speed and effective weapon range.
 %c[d_green] • %c[ui_gray_2] Slight increased weapon damage.
